_schema_note: One object per media item under 'entries'. category must match a filter-bar data-filter value (factory, materials, biker, bomber, varsity, trench-shearling, qc-export, team-bts). type is 'image' or 'video'. linked_catalog deep-links into catalog.html. Phase 3 wires Make.com to append new entries here automatically when new files land in the matching Google Drive folder — see /automation/make-scenario-blueprint.json.
